title: Object
description: An object in Cloud Storage. Objects are the individual pieces of data that you store in Cloud Storage.

kind.description: The kind of item this is. For objects, this is always storage#object.

id.description: The ID of the object, including the bucket name, object name, and generation number.

mediaLink.description: The link to download the object's data.

bucket.description: The name of the bucket containing this object.

generation.description: The content generation of this object. Used for object versioning.

metageneration.description: The version of the metadata for this object. Used for preconditions and detecting metadata changes.

timeCreated.description: The creation time of the object in RFC 3339 format.

updated.description: The modification time of the object metadata in RFC 3339 format.

timeDeleted.description: The deletion time of the object in RFC 3339 format. Set only when the object is noncurrent.

temporaryHold.description: Whether the object is under a temporary hold.

eventBasedHold.description: Whether the object is under an event-based hold.

retentionExpirationTime.description: The earliest time that the object can be deleted or replaced, based on the retention policy.

timeStorageClassUpdated.description: The time at which the object's storage class was last changed.

size.description: Content-Length of the data in bytes.

md5Hash.description: MD5 hash of the data, encoded using base64. Not available for composite objects.

etag.description: HTTP 1.1 Entity tag for the object.

componentCount.description: Number of underlying components that make up a composite object.

cacheControl.description: Cache-Control directive for the object data.

customerEncryption.description: Metadata of customer-supplied encryption key, if the object is encrypted by such a key.

kmsKeyName.description: Cloud KMS key used to encrypt the object, if one has been specified.

customTime.description: A timestamp in RFC 3339 format specified by the user for an object. Typically set to enable lifecycle management conditions based on custom time.

softDeleteTime.description: The time at which the object was soft-deleted, if applicable.

hardDeleteTime.description: The time at which the soft-deleted object will be permanently deleted.
